title: Create Food Log
description: Creates a food log entry for a given day.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: foodId
parameters.description: ID of the food to be logged. Either foodId or foodName must be provided.

parameters.name: foodName
parameters.description: Food entry name. Either foodId or foodName must be provided.

parameters.name: mealTypeId
parameters.description: Numerical value representing the meal type. Supported: 1 =Breakfast | 2 =Morning Snack | 3 =Lunch | 4 =Afternoon Snack | 5 =Dinner | 7 =Anytime

parameters.name: unitId
parameters.description: ID representing the units used. The units ID can be retrieved using the Get Food Logs, Search Foods or Get Food Units endpoints.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: value representing the amount consumed in the format X.XX in the specified unitId.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Log entry date in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

parameters.name: favorite
parameters.description: Supported: true | false True will add the food to the user's favorite's after creating the log entry. Supported only when the foodId value is used.

parameters.name: brandName
parameters.description: Brand name of the food. Supported only when the foodName parameter is used.

parameters.name: calories
parameters.description: Number of calories for this serving size. Allowed with foodName parameter and defaults to zero. Otherwise, the parameter value is ignored.

response_fields.name: foodLog : nutritionalValues
response_fields.description: Available nutritional values for the food consumed.
